ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the companies table */,
  "jurisdiction" TEXT /* Jurisdiction where the transaction occurred */,
  "period_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the period for the transaction */,
  "period_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the period for the transaction */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used for the transaction */,
  "conversion_rate" REAL /* Conversion rate from the transaction currency to CAD */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country associated with the transaction */,
  "payee" TEXT /* Payee of the transaction */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Foreign key to the projects table */,
  "payment_category" TEXT /* Category of the payment (e.g., Fees, Royalties) */,
  "amount_reported" REAL /* Amount reported in the transaction currency */,
  "amount_reported_in_cad" REAL /* Amount reported in Canadian Dollars */,
  "note" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* The date when the transaction was recorded */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* The type of transaction (e.g., Payment, Receipt) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* The method of payment (e.g., Bank Transfer, Check, Credit Card) */,
  "invoice_number" TEXT /* The invoice number associated with the transaction */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* A JSON field to store audit trail information */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* The user who created the transaction */,
  "updated_by" TEXT /* The user who last updated the transaction */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the transaction was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* The timestamp when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_transactions_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Legal name of the company */,
  "headquarters" TEXT /* Location of the company headquarters */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the company */,
  "company_reg_number" TEXT /* The registration number of the company */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* The website URL of the company */,
  "company_phone" TEXT /* The contact phone number for the company */,
  "company_fax" TEXT /* The fax number for the company */,
  "company_address" TEXT /* The physical address of the company */,
  "company_type" TEXT /* The type of company (e.g., Public, Private) */,
  "company_status" TEXT /* The current status of the company (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the mining project */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the mining project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the mining project */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the mining project */,
  "project_manager" TEXT /* The name of the project manager */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the project */,
  "project_status" TEXT /* The current status of the project (e.g., Active, Completed, On Hold) */,
  "project_budget" REAL /* The budget allocated for the project */,
  "project_actual_cost" REAL /* The actual cost incurred for the project */,
  "project_start_date_actual" TEXT /* The actual start date of the project */,
  "project_end_date_actual" TEXT /* The actual end date of the project */,
  "project_type" TEXT /* The type of project (e.g., Exploration, Production) */,
  "project_documents" TEXT /* A JSON field to store relevant project documents */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)
